commands: cd /home/ec2-user/reportafrica && git fetch origin main && git reset --hard origin/main

nohup bash -c 'cd /home/ec2-user/reportafrica && docker build -t reportafrica-api -f apps/api/Dockerfile . && docker stop reportafrica-api 2>/dev/null; docker rm reportafrica-api 2>/dev/null; docker run -d --name reportafrica-api --restart always -p 3001:3001 --env-file /home/ec2-user/.env.production reportafrica-api' > /tmp/build.log 2>&1 &
